desc: I idolize a particular hero of my faith.
I can find common ground between the fiercest enemies.
I fall in and out of love easily.
I have a joke for every occasion.
I always have a plan for what to do when things go wrong.
I am always calm, no matter what the situation.
I know a story relevant to almost every situation.
I love a good insult, even one directed at me.
I judge people by their actions, not their words.
If someone is in trouble, I'm always ready to lend help.
I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm rude to people who lack my commitment to hard work.
I've been isolated for so long that I rarely speak, preferring gestures.
I am utterly serene, even in the face of disaster.
My eloquent flattery makes everyone I talk to feel like the most wonderful person in the world.
I take great pains to look my best and follow the latest fashions.
I'm driven by a wanderlust that led me away from home.
I watch over my friends as if they were a litter of newborn pups.
I use polysyllabic words to convey intelligence.
I've read every book in the world's greatest libraries.
My friends know they can rely on me, no matter what.
I work hard so that I can play hard when the work is done.
I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm haunted by memories of war. I fight these doubts with humor.
I hide scraps of food and trinkets away in my pockets.
I ask a lot of questions.
